# Bad Headings Article

This article uses H3 for tool sections instead of H2.

### Tool: Create Resource

<!-- tool create -->

Creates a resource.

| Parameter | Required or optional | Description |
|-----------|----------------------|-------------|
| **Name** | Required | The resource name. |

### Tool: Delete Resource

<!-- tool delete -->

Deletes a resource.
